summary: Scaffolded a Next.js App Router app with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, a base MicroGap Radar home page, server-only typed env access, npm scripts, lockfile, and README local development commands.

tests_run.result: Build passed. Next.js emitted a Windows native SWC warning and used the WASM fallback.

decisions: Kept implementation to scaffold only; no database, auth, SERP, LLM, or deployment work.
Used server-only typed environment access in lib/env.ts to avoid exposing secrets to the client.
risks: Next.js reported the native @next/swc-win32-x64-msvc binary was not a valid Win32 application, then successfully used the WASM fallback.
requested_action: Review actual diff, required tests, task scope, and acceptance criteria for M0-SCAFFOLD-NEXT-001.
